title: Ring of Undying
description: Turns the totem of undying into a ring that has a minimal offhand view and it's own 3D item model
body:
Gives the totem of undying a small custom item model that looks like a emerald ring!
It completely removes the offhand model view but keeps it in the main hand for when you want to view it in first person.
![In Main Hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4360c246d01cb8a944483f3e402385bf7744a9b6.png)
